description: Change Garmin BaseCamp's map datum to 'NAD27 CONUS' and set the position format to Degrees/Minutes/Seconds (Lat/Lon hddd° mm' ss.s"). After applying these global settings, open the Track Properties for the 'fells_loop' track. Record the displayed coordinates of the very first track point (Index 1) and the very last track point (scroll to the bottom of the list). Write these to a text file at 'C:\workspace\output\nad27_coordinates.txt' using exactly this format (one per line): 'First Point: N 42° 26\' 27.5", W 071° 06\' 15.2"' and 'Last Point: N 42° 26\' 27.8", W 071° 06\' 15.0"'. Finally, with the Track Properties dialog still open and the last track point visible/selected, take a screenshot and save it to 'C:\workspace\output\proof_last_point.png'.
